ticker_headline: Tiruchengode temple car tragedy raises safety concerns in local procession
blog_title: Temple procession accident in Tiruchengode leaves student dead
blog_content: A college student died after getting stuck in the wheel of a temple car during a procession in Tiruchengode, prompting renewed concern over crowd safety and procession management in Tamil Nadu towns. According to the report, the incident occurred when the temple car took a sharp left turn and two young men were near the rear wheel. The tragedy is likely to intensify discussion around safety protocols at religious and public gatherings, especially in densely packed local events. District authorities may face questions over whether adequate barricading, crowd control and emergency response measures were in place. The incident has cast a shadow over the local celebration and the broader issue of public safety during temple festivals.
